old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-0p44","title":"Distinguish Rust frame buffer exhaustion","description":"LichenFrame::write_to currently returns FrameTooLarge both for a protocol body over 254 bytes and for a caller-provided output buffer that is too small. Add a distinct non-breaking error path or planned API revision so callers can determine whether retrying with a larger buffer can succeed.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-18T23:39:22.838821Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T23:39:22.838821Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-0p44","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.35.2","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-18T23:39:22.99614Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Distinguished via new BufferTooSmall variant in FrameError; updated write_to impl, serializer test, error handling; cargo test and clippy pass for lichen-core and lichen-link.
